name: Egg Beaters & Healthy Choice Cheese Scrambled Eggs
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the Fleischmann's Original Margarine in a skillet over medium heat.
2. Lightly sauté the diced peppers until they are just tender.
3. Add the Egg Beaters to the skillet and cook without stirring until the mixture begins to set on the bottom and around the edges.
4. Sprinkle the Healthy Choice shredded cheese evenly over the egg beaters.
5. Gently stir the mixture so that any uncooked portions flow underneath, continuing to cook until everything is thoroughly combined but still moist.
6. Remove from heat and serve immediately.
Serves 2
